title: Buster Call Over Enies Lobby
description: In the Enies Lobby Climax storyline, this section centers on Luffy, Unknown person #9, Franky, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #1 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Enies Lobby Climax conflict through Luffy, Unknown person #9, Franky, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of buster call over enies lobby.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm sure KoKoro BAA-San did say

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: that the gates would never fully open....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But is that because of the steam?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As long as I can defeat you,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: EVERY- THING WILL BE ALL RIGHT!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Don't go just yet, nice Robin!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Stand in a row and salute!!!
